meaning: n.(为女子做发的)理发师,美容师
examples: She has set up in business as a hairdresser.
I'm lucky because my sister is a hairdresser.
The first list features nine names, including a hairdresser, a coach operator and a knitwear manufacturer.
Tuesday afternoon, a hairdresser was coming in to "give her a little pampering, " Ms. Harlan said.
